beats.speaker: Craig
beats.text: What did you just say about my SMOKER, Doug?

beats.speaker: Doug
beats.text: I said it's a GLORIFIED TRASH CAN, CRAIG—
Shove. Tackle. Cooler goes horizontal. Beer geysers. A hot dog pinwheels through the air in slow motion.

beats.speaker: Brenda
beats.text: DOUGLAS! NOT AT THE THING! DOUGLAS!

end_a.text: Dad wades in, pulls them apart. Doug hugs him, sobbing slightly. Craig shakes his hand. The grill keeps grilling.

end_b.text: Dad, vertical phone, wide smile. 'OH THIS IS GOING ON FACEBOOK.' Karen stares at him like she's never met him.
